title: polypodium taeniatum var. angustatum
intro: Polypodium taeniatum var. angustatum, also known as Narrow-leaved Polypody, is a species of fern native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat various conditions including wounds, eczema, and respiratory issues. Polypodium taeniatum var. angustatum is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for herbal use.
